sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  pageWrapper:
    "min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-slate-100 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-10 py-8",

  container:
    "max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-8",

  /* ================= HEADER ================= */

  header:
    "space-y-3",

  title:
    "text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl xl:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900",

  subtitle:
    "text-xs sm:text-sm md:text-base lg:text-lg text-slate-500",

  pathWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-2 text-sm sm:text-base md:text-lg",

  /* inactive path = blue */
  path:
    "text-blue-600 cursor-pointer transition hover:text-blue-700",

  /* active path = gray */
  pathActive:
    "text-slate-700 font-semibold",

  pathDivider:
    "text-slate-400",

  /* ================= NAVBAR ================= */

  navbar:
    "flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-5 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md p-4 sm:p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-md",

  searchWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-100/70 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl w-full lg:w-80 transition focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-slate-400",

  searchInput:
    "bg-transparent outline-none text-sm sm:text-base w-full text-slate-700 placeholder:text-slate-400",

  rightControls:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 w-full lg:w-auto",

  /* ================= PREMIUM DROPDOWN ================= */

  sortSelect:
    "appearance-none bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-700 to-slate-800 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm sm:text-base shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500",

  /* ================= PREMIUM BUTTON ================= */


  submitButton:
    "bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-700 to-slate-900 hover:from-slate-800 hover:to-black text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm sm:text-base font-medium shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200",

  cancelButton:
    "bg-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-300 text-slate-700 px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm sm:text-base transition",

  /* ================= FORM ================= */

  form:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 bg-white p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-lg",

  input:
    "border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm sm:text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-600 outline-none transition",

  /* ================= TABLE ================= */

  table:
    "bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-md divide-y divide-slate-100 overflow-hidden",

  row:
    "grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 items-center px-6 py-5 text-sm sm:text-base md:text-lg hover:bg-slate-50 transition",



    dropdownButton:
    "flex items-center gap-2 bg-white border border-slate-300 px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm sm:text-base shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition",

  dropdownMenu:
    "absolute right-0 mt-3 w-56 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden z-50",

  dropdownItem:
    "px-5 py-3 text-sm sm:text-base hover:bg-slate-100 cursor-pointer transition",

  addButton:
    "ml-4 inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-600 to-slate-800 hover:from-slate-700 hover:to-slate-900 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm sm:text-base font-medium shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200",
};
